role: Core file management and integrity tracking subsystem for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Provides a unified facade for file operations (create, update, delete, query), integrity verification via SHA-256 hashing, synchronous I/O for .spine manifest files, manifest and language snapshot persistence, and stable type definitions for file status snapshots.

children.role: Facade class that orchestrates file tracking, metadata management, and persistence operations over the SpineDB.
Infrastructure utility for computing file integrity hashes, used by the Spine gate to detect file changes.
Low-level synchronous I/O utility for reading JSON manifest files and computing canonical paths within the .spine directory. Provides a thin wrapper around fs and path for the manifest subsystem.
Infrastructure facade for manifest and language snapshot persistence in the ArchSpine mirror system.
Protocol type definition defining the shape of a file status snapshot for use across the ArchSpine scanning and synchronization layers.
